raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.0,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.7,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.3,
    "RX.2": 0.3,
    "RX.3": 0.3,
    "RX.4": 0.3,
    "RX.5": 0.3
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "By 'clean this up', do you mean primarily sentence- and paragraph-level polishing (grammar, flow, conciseness), or a more comprehensive edit that also includes structural reorganization and logical consistency verification?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The delegation to 'clean this up' peripherally involves verifying logical consistency to ensure the argument chain is sound during editing.",
    "R1.5": "Structural reorganization is a central expected responsibility for cleaning up the narrative arc and paragraph ordering in the artifact.",
    "R1.6": "Writing polish is load-bearing for the delegation, as cleaning up directly targets grammar, flow, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph levels.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty disclosure is a nice-to-have to ensure any ambiguities in the text are appropriately highlighted during cleanup.",
    "RX.2": "Overclaim avoidance is peripheral to prevent exaggerated statements in the polished version of the research abstract.",
    "RX.3": "Scope adherence is a nice-to-have to keep the cleaned text within the original topic boundaries.",
    "RX.4": "Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral, as the effect systems topic could have indirect implications that should not be amplified.",
    "RX.5": "Provenance and traceability is a nice-to-have to maintain accurate attribution in the cleaned artifact."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: By 'clean this up', do you mean primarily sentence- and paragraph-level polishing (grammar, flow, conciseness), or a more comprehensive edit that also includes structural reorganization and logical consistency verification?

rationale.R1.2: The delegation to 'clean this up' peripherally involves verifying logical consistency to ensure the argument chain is sound during editing.
rationale.R1.5: Structural reorganization is a central expected responsibility for cleaning up the narrative arc and paragraph ordering in the artifact.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is load-bearing for the delegation, as cleaning up directly targets grammar, flow, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph levels.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a nice-to-have to ensure any ambiguities in the text are appropriately highlighted during cleanup.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is peripheral to prevent exaggerated statements in the polished version of the research abstract.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is a nice-to-have to keep the cleaned text within the original topic boundaries.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral, as the effect systems topic could have indirect implications that should not be amplified.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is a nice-to-have to maintain accurate attribution in the cleaned artifact.
